title: Canonical story-group definitions
description: Pinned by meta_version.json -> canonical_stories_hash. Each entry is a story key -> definition. As of PR2 Phase B (meta-v9.0.0) the primary matcher is embedding-based softmax-argmax via analytical/perception.py — it reads `embedding_anchors` + `assignment_floor`. The legacy `patterns` + `exclude` regex fields are retained for find_emerging_stories() (token-based discovery pre-filter) but no longer drive briefing assignment.

stories.description: Story key -> definition. Keys are stable identifiers used by every downstream stage; renames invalidate longitudinal comparison.

items.description: Python re.search regex (case-insensitive). LEGACY (pre-v9.0.0). Now consumed only by analytical/build_briefing.find_emerging_stories() as a canonical-pattern pre-filter — does NOT drive briefing assignment. Briefing assignment is via embedding_anchors below.

exclude.description: Veto regexes. LEGACY companion to `patterns` (same notes apply).

tier.description: Priority tier for build_briefing's iteration order. long_running runs first under --max-stories caps; dated runs last.

items.description: 1-2 sentence description of one angle of the story. May include native-script multilingual variants. Encoded by the model in meta.PERCEPTION.embedding_model; mean-pooled + unit-normed → story centroid that articles are scored against. Added meta-v9.0.0.

embedding_anchors.description: Anchor sentences for embedding softmax-argmax matching (PR2 Phase B). Required for v9.x assignment; absence falls back to regex patterns.

assignment_floor.description: Per-story override of meta.PERCEPTION.assignment_floor_default. Articles whose argmax cosine against this story's centroid is below this floor are NOT assigned. Added meta-v9.0.0.
